scripts.deploy:lg: npm run build:lg && rm -rf /tmp/lg-clean && mkdir /tmp/lg-clean && cp lg-tv-wrapper/index.html lg-tv-wrapper/appinfo.json lg-tv-wrapper/icon.png lg-tv-wrapper/largeIcon.png lg-tv-wrapper/favicon.svg lg-tv-wrapper/background.jpeg /tmp/lg-clean/ && ares-package /tmp/lg-clean -o /tmp/lg-build && ares-install /tmp/lg-build/com.usforever.tv_1.0.0_all.ipk && ares-launch com.usforever.tv
scripts.deploy:samsung: npm run build:samsung && export PATH="$PATH:/home/nitin/tizen-studio/tools/ide/bin:/home/nitin/tizen-studio/tools" && rm -rf /tmp/samsung-pkg && mkdir /tmp/samsung-pkg && cp samsung-tv-wrapper/index.html /home/nitin/workspace/SamsungTvApp/index.html && cp /home/nitin/workspace/SamsungTvApp/config.xml /home/nitin/workspace/SamsungTvApp/icon.png /home/nitin/workspace/SamsungTvApp/background.jpeg samsung-tv-wrapper/index.html /tmp/samsung-pkg/ && cd /tmp/samsung-pkg && tizen package -t wgt -s UsForeverTV -- . && mv "/tmp/samsung-pkg/UsForever TV.wgt" /tmp/samsung-pkg/app.wgt && tizen install -n /tmp/samsung-pkg/app.wgt -s emulator-26101 && tizen run -p A06iHSMjr0.SamsungTvApp -s emulator-26101
scripts.deploy:android: npm run build:android && cd /tmp/apk_work && cp /home/nitin/Desktop/tv-app/android-tv-wrapper/index.html extracted/assets/index.html && cp /home/nitin/Desktop/tv-app/android-tv-wrapper/build.txt extracted/assets/build.txt && cd extracted && zip -q -r ../repacked.apk . -0 && cd .. && zipalign -f 4 repacked.apk aligned.apk && apksigner sign --ks ~/.android/debug.keystore --ks-pass pass:android --key-pass pass:android --ks-key-alias androiddebugkey --out signed.apk aligned.apk && adb -s emulator-5554 reboot && adb -s emulator-5554 wait-for-device && until adb -s emulator-5554 shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | grep -q 1; do sleep 2; done && sleep 4 && adb -s emulator-5554 uninstall com.usforevertv; adb -s emulator-5554 install -t signed.apk && adb -s emulator-5554 shell pm clear com.usforevertv && adb -s emulator-5554 shell monkey -p com.usforevertv -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1 && rm -rf ~/.android/avd/Television_1080p_API_34.avd/snapshots/default_boot
scripts.launch:android: adb -s emulator-5554 shell pm clear com.usforevertv && adb -s emulator-5554 shell monkey -p com.usforevertv -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1
scripts.stop:android: adb -s emulator-5554 shell am force-stop com.usforevertv
